status_note: Throughput-tuned reference (max_num_seqs=8). Same weights and quality as cyankiwi; raising concurrency lets the batched evals finish inside the per-task wall-clock budget. This is the configuration measured on the competition cloud.

gpqa_diamond.note: near the GPQA-D floor; local full-pool mean ~0.64

local_measurements.summary: GPQA-Diamond full pool (n=198) local: 0.641, Wilson CI [0.572, 0.706]. ~37% of thinking-mode traces hit the generation cap, suppressing the scored mean.

notes: Config delta vs cyankiwi: max_num_seqs 1->8; cudagraph capture sizes 8 -> {8,16,24,32,40,48,56,64}; gpu_memory_utilization 0.90 -> 0.92. No quality knob (weights, quant, chat template) changed.
